candidate_definition_hints.text: Concealed Object Detection (SINet-V2, IEEE TPAMI 2022). Code is implemented by PyTorch/Jittor frameworks.
PyTorch implementation of our extended model, termed as Search and Identification Network (SINet-V2), for the COD task.
